---
title: the bridge keeps falling down
date: 2026-06-30
categories: poetry
---

I don’t know what it means
I felt it in a dream,
The bridge keeps falling down. 
The bridge keeps falling down. 

Others have the eyes
They see with no surprise
The most difficult of scenes,
The most difficult of scenes. 

What else could we know,
Our rhythms are so slow
They hold on to the end 
They hold on to the end. 

Adventure comes to call,
Pursues us through the wall,
Gather your dreams together 
Gather your dreams together. 

Fall through with your dreams,
It isn’t what it seems,
The bridge keeps falling down,
The bridge keeps falling down.
